channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in Australia
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in Australia — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: Sugar — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 7.2 · Worth a watch — John Sugar is a dashing private eye navigating the dark corners of sunny LA. Though he sees only the good in humanity, Sugar is haunted by a secret too…

item.title: The Odyssey — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.0 · Worth a watch — Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.

item.title: THE GHOST IN THE SHELL — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Japanese · ★ 9.0 · Must watch — 2029, a near-future Japan. The full cyborg Motoko Kusanagi envisions a task force that preemptively strikes emerging threats.

item.title: Little House on the Prairie — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 6.2 · Decent one-time watch — The close-knit Ingalls family builds a new life on the Western frontier, where the joys of nature and the struggle for survival are deeply intertwined.

item.title: Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You — Crunchyroll
item.description: Crunchyroll · Japanese · ★ 9.0 · Must watch — Sasaki is an overworked salaryman drifting through the corporate grind, sustained by cigarettes and the cheerful service and smile of Yamada, the clerk at his…

item.title: Chainsmoker Cat — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.7 · Must watch — Catgirl Yani struggles to pay her rent and keep a job while feeding her smoking habit. As her loved ones' concerns grow, she must rethink her future.

item.title: Moana — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 5.8 · Decent one-time watch — Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.8 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As they transform into Deadites one by one, she comes to discover that the vows she…

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Silo — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: Enola Holmes 3 — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 7.0 · Worth a watch — Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

item.title: The Invite — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.6 · Must watch — Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.

item.title: House of the Dragon — Foxtel Now
item.description: Foxtel Now · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: Saccharine — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.1 · Decent one-time watch — After succumbing to an obscure weight-loss craze involving the eating of human ashes, lovelorn medical student Hana finds herself haunted by the ghost of the…

item.title: Animal Farm — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.5 · Decent one-time watch — A group of farm animals rise up against their neglectful owner, dreaming of equality and freedom.

item.title: Good Boy — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.1 · Worth a watch — Tommy, a volatile 19-year-old, revels in drugs, parties and violence. After getting separated from his friends on a drunken bender, he is abducted by a shadowy…
